# Chapter 9: Defence and security as engineered systems  (~100 pp)
- 9.1 Defence as engineered domain (12) · 9.2 Defence-industrial supply chains and procurement (15) · 9.3 Sensors, networks, and command-and-control (15) · 9.4 Cyber defence at the state scale (15) · 9.5 Critical-infrastructure defence (12) · 9.6 Dual-use technology and export control (10) · 9.7 Arms control and verification engineering (10) · 9.8 Failure section: defence-systems failures (Patriot timing, Bradley vehicle, F-35 ALIS, Crowdstrike outage as critical-infrastructure case) (11)

**Archetype**: control, ethics, failure. **Project**: design a small defence-relevant component (drone-jammer detector, secure radio, supply-chain provenance tool); document trade-offs and dual-use considerations. **Exercises**: 22.
